sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 26:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 26:1
items.html: The coarseness in the Partzuf from phase four in the desire (see “coarseness,” Item 53 below) is called the “matter of the Partzuf.” This name is borrowed from the imaginary corporeal substance that consists of the three dimensions: length, width, and depth, and six directions: up, down, east, west, north, and south.
